query:
SELECT u.email, u.name, u.role, c.name as clientName 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON u.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name = 'SRV' AND u.role = 'admin';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT u.email, u.name, u.role, c.name as clientName 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON u.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name = 'SRV' AND u.role = 'admin';
